description:
【3 In 1 Multifunctional Fruit Tool】The fruit tool is designed in one piece and can be easily divided into 3 fruit spoon tools. The fruit spoon kitchen tool set is suitable for watermelon, cantaloupe, dragon fruit, kiwi fruit, etc.

【Stackable Design】Unique design that nests separate tools together to form a single unit. Clean and tidy, it not only saves valuable space in the kitchen, but you don't have to worry about losing one of them.

【 High-Quality Materials】Made of high-quality PP plastic and stainless steel, safe and durable. Resistant to wear and tear, not easily deformed or broken. Easy to use and clean. After use, just clean and keep dry after use.

【Wide Range Of Applications】Suuker fruit knife set can be applied to make all kinds of fruit balls, such as watermelon, cantaloupe, pitaya, kiwi, etc. You can make any fruit salad you want with the fruit carving tool and enjoy the pleasure it brings you.


Description:
These double-sided melon ballers do more than make nicely sized melon balls, you can also use them to prep a variety of fruit, veggies, and sweet and savory items.

The small-sized scoop cleanly removes seeds from vegetables like bell, cucumbers, and summer and winter squash. The big-sized scoop is ideal for fruit, ice cream, cupcakes, cookies, and more.

Unique design and function include a melon baller for digging, a V-shaped carver knife for fruit carving, big and small fruit scooper for fruit slicing and fruit pulp separating, a must-have handy kitchen tool, a perfect tool kit for fruit salads, garnishes, and healthy fruit snacks.

Designed for safety, the material we used is food-grade plastic and corrosion-resistant stainless steel, also we upgraded the production technique to make the blade and handle assembled fully and tightly, you never need to worry loosen or breaking during usage.

EASY TO USE AND EASY TO CLEAN: This multifunction fruit vegetable scooper and baller set are all with stainless steel heads, which makes it easier but more efficient to use than plastic ones, with no odor left after use. Simply rinse or toss it in a top-rack dishwasher for cleaning, and dry storage.

EASY TO STORE: The integrated design makes these 3 individual tools can be nested together as one set, hung or put inside the drawer for storage, clean and tidy, not only can save valuable space in your kitchen but also no need to worry misplace to lose any of them.

Specification:
Material:PP + stainless steel
Color: As shown in the figure
Size: 24x7cm
